selections.name: City Gold Field
selections.reason: Resuming after a long spell but has trialled exceptionally well, winning recently at Deagon. Bold showing expected.

selections.name: Terrax
selections.reason: Solid Victorian form shipping up north. Placed in both career starts at Mornington and represents a huge threat.

selections.name: Solvent
selections.reason: Stuart Kendrick-trained Snitzel gelding who was excellent on debut when third at Gold Coast. Big run anticipated first-up.

selections.name: Bartle Frere
selections.reason: Placed on debut at Rockhampton on a slow track. This is tougher but has scope for improvement.

danger_horse.name: Solvent
danger_horse.reason: Progressive Kendrick runner returning to home track after a solid debut performance.

selections.name: Tasman Bay
selections.reason: Barry Lockwood-trained mare who was narrowly beaten on debut here. Trialled brilliantly at Doomben and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Carpet Ride
selections.reason: Matthew Hoysted-trained filly returning after a long break. Won her latest trial at Doomben and is highly progressive.

selections.name: Magnetic Island
selections.reason: Excellent third first-up at Beaudesert when sitting on the speed. Fitter now and has strong claims.

selections.name: Queen Of The Moon
selections.reason: Robert Heathcote-trained filly who showed improvement second-up at Eagle Farm. In with a chance.

danger_horse.name: Carpet Ride
danger_horse.reason: Highly progressive filly from the Hoysted stable who trialled exceptionally well.

selections.name: Katie Aine
selections.reason: Chris Munce-trained filly who was a dominant first-up winner at SCTC over 5f. Fitter now and can go back-to-back.

selections.name: Miss Funny Honey
selections.reason: Stuart Kendrick-trained filly racing in great heart. Excellent effort in 3yo Qlty last start and has strong claims.

selections.name: Abraham
selections.reason: Resuming. Highly consistent last preparation with a win and multiple placings. Expected to run well fresh.

selections.name: Cantankerous
selections.reason: Matthew Hoysted-trained gelding who has tactical speed. Ashley Butler booked to ride.

danger_horse.name: Miss Funny Honey
danger_horse.reason: Local filly racing in career-best form and gets a soft run from barrier 4.

selections.name: Old Faithful
selections.reason: Stuart Kendrick-trained gelding who won in dominant fashion over 1 3/8m here last start. Hard to fault.

selections.name: Double Whammy
selections.reason: Solid fourth at Eagle Farm last start. Stuart Kendrick stable is flying and he will appreciate SCTC.

selections.name: Trump Card
selections.reason: David Vandyke-trained gelding who was a close second over 1 3/8m on heavy track two starts back. Major player.

selections.name: Sunny Disposition
selections.reason: Won by a nose at Beaudesert last start over 1 9/16m. Fit and in form.

danger_horse.name: Double Whammy
danger_horse.reason: Stablemate to the top pick who is ready to peak over this distance.

selections.name: Odessa
selections.reason: Tony & Calvin McEvoy-trained filly who was a close fourth at Doomben last start. High-quality performer who rates on top.

selections.name: Air We Go
selections.reason: Stuart Kendrick-trained Capitalist gelding who won second-up last prep. Fitter for one run back and has class.

selections.name: Cherrabah
selections.reason: Barry Lockwood-trained mare who was a close fourth at Gold Coast last start. Strong each-way chance.

selections.name: Thankyou Henry
selections.reason: Tactical speed and handles rain-affected tracks well. Rough chance.

danger_horse.name: Air We Go
danger_horse.reason: Local track specialist who has won second-up previously and gets a great map.

selections.name: Iconify
selections.reason: Tony Gollan-trained gelding who won in style at Eagle Farm over 1m last start. Progressive and hard to beat.

selections.name: And I Am
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after a dominant win over 1m here last start. Thriving on racing and is the main danger.

selections.name: Thinking Gold
selections.reason: Billy Healey-trained gelding resuming. Strong Melbourne form last campaign and has trialled well.

selections.name: Clive's Glory
selections.reason: Billy Healey-trained gelding who was a close second at Grafton last start. Rates highly.

danger_horse.name: And I Am
danger_horse.reason: In-form local who loves the track and distance and is chasing three wins in a row.

selections.name: Ninjask
selections.reason: Peter Robl-trained gelding who was a close fourth at Gold Coast last start. Drawn well and has excellent credentials.

selections.name: Redcloud
selections.reason: Corey & Kylie Geran-trained gelding who won in dominant style at Toowoomba last start. Can measure up again.

selections.name: Better Yet
selections.reason: Indiana Turner-trained mare who was a close second at Gold Coast last start. Honest and reliable.

selections.name: Ucelle
selections.reason: Gained start as emergency. Excellent second at Gatton last start and has tactical speed.

danger_horse.name: Redcloud
danger_horse.reason: Impressive last-start winner who has rapid upside despite the wide draw.
